chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 403 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1625/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.1626/2022 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.1627/2022 (Stay) 14-04-2022 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. Office has raised an objection as to maintainability of this Petition, as apparently, there is a dispute between the Petitioner and Respondent No.6 as being legal heirs of the deceased of which the pension is being claimed. In that case, the Petitioner as well as Respondent No.6 have to approach the appropriate Court for obtaining a succession certificate / letter of administration. In view of such position, Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed with pending applications; whereas, the Petitioner may seek appropriate remedy in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
